channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Residents garden works damaged pavement, 4th March
item.description:
Hi there I think it’s number 38 but they’ve had their driveway and garden done and it’s left the footpath damaged. Please can this be rectified

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leigham Avenue, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped black bags of rubbish, 4th March
item.description:
Some one has dumped three black bin bags of rubbish on our street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Culford Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light on during day, 4th March
item.description:
Street light 56C7 is on during the daytime.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crossway, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Pothole across whole carrigeway, 4th March
item.description:
Pothole has been there for weeks and road surface continues to deteriorate
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Church Hill Road, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Christmas trees in March?, 4th March
item.description:
12 days of Xmas… But how long will these trees be left? It’s attracting flytipping?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 130, Albacore Crescent, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Pothole next to speed hump, other nearby damage, 4th March
item.description:
Pothole been there for several months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Hill Road, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on statue, 4th March
item.description:
Graffiti on statue in park. Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike parking markers not installed, 4th March
item.description:
Lime bike markers are not installed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Donatt's Road, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footway parking on Luxmore St, 4th March
item.description:
These vehicles are footway parked on Luxmore St. Pedestrians are unable to use footpaths.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Donatt's Road, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left on green, 4th March
item.description:
On green next to 91 Petersham Drive rubbish left by roofing contractors which has now been added to with gardening and other household waste
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Petersham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter down all of Anerley Park, 4th March
item.description:
There is a lot of litter down Anerley Park - both on the pavement and road. I have picked up over 100 bottles and cans but it really needs council attention - someone with a broom and litterpicker. The brush vehicle misses the areas next to cars. When refuse is collected if the council had sweepers + pickers cleaning spliiage it would considerably help. Please can the litter on the road beside cars + pavement be cleared. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in supermarket trolley, 4th March
item.description:
Black bags left in supermarket trolley
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woldham Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This vehicle parks on footway on regular basis., 4th March
item.description:
This vehicle parks on footway on regular basis. It means pedestrians are unable to walk on the footpath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clare Road, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal dumping site created over the years., 4th March
item.description:
The land belongs to the council. There is large-scale waste accumulation causing vermin risk. Under the Environmental Protection Act 1990 and public health legislation, the landowner has responsibility. Please confirm what action will be taken and within what timeframe

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Course, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Along no 31n 33 Prestbury Square pavements SE9 4LZ, 4th March
item.description:
Big rubbish bins x5 left on the pavements throughout the year, along house number 31 - 33 and at times the rubbish is extend to half of the outside pavement in no 35. The bins belong to house number 31 and number 33. Paper Boxes which belongs to no 33,not torn up hence rubbish men will not pick them up on collection hence left along the pavements.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prestbury Square, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This blocked gulley has been reported often, 4th March
item.description:
This blocked gulley has been reported often

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Street, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hazel mirror between Brondsbury and Victoria, 4th March
item.description:
Pillow box

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hazelmere Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Dumped mattress, 4th March
item.description:
Flytipped mattress.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bostall Lane, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in bins area next to Barbrook house not fully cleared, 4th March
item.description:
I reported the issue this morning and got confirmation that it was resolved. However there is still one of the sofas left to be picked up and bags on top of the recycling bins (the green recycling bags that do not belong to this building).

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paragon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
